\tzpentry{ID11423}{S4 Mode Density Scaling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For S4, mode density scales as R to the minus fifth.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\rho_{S^{4}}\sim R^{-5}
